SEARCH
Package wzlib

Class WzObject

java.lang.Object
wzlib.WzObject
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
WzDirectory, WzFile, WzImage, WzImageProperty
public abstract class WzObject extends Object implements Closeable
所有 WZ 物件的抽象基底類別。 Abstract base class for all WZ objects.

Ported from: MapleLib/WzLib/WzObject.cs
